name: EMR Direct Open API
description: EMR Direct Open API providing read-only access to patient health records via HL7 FHIR R4 RESTful endpoints, aligned with US Core profiles (v3.1.1). Supports SMART App Launch Framework scopes and OAuth 2.0 authentication. Only TLS 1.2 connections are accepted.
